ham.subject: Out of Office Auto-Reply – Rahul
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am currently out of office on leave from 15th Aug to 22nd Aug. I will not be checking emails during this period. For any urgent matters, please contact my colleague Sita at sita@example.com.

Thanks,
Rahul

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Gift Card Request – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Recipient Name],

This is Amitabh, CEO of ABC Pvt Ltd. We are conducting a compliance audit and need your immediate assistance. Kripya purchase a gift card worth INR 50,000 and forward the receipt to <URL> as soon as possible. Failure to comply will result in a penalty and may affect your account standing.

Dhanyavaad,
Amitabh
Chief Executive Officer
ABC Pvt Ltd
